description: Calculate the Heat Rate and efficiency status for biomass power plants in /home/ga/Documents/eia923_biomass_data.xlsx and build a state-level performance summary. In the Plant_Data sheet, calculate the Heat_Rate (Fuel_Consumed_MMBtu ÷ Net_Generation_MWh), recording "No Gen" if Net_Generation_MWh is 0 or negative. Categorize the Efficiency_Status based on the Heat_Rate: "Offline" for "No Gen", "Optimal" for values less than 12.0, "Normal" for values between 12.0 and 18.0 inclusive, and "Review" for values greater than 18.0. Create a new sheet named State_Summary containing a performance summary for the states CA, FL, GA, ME, MI, and WA. The summary must include columns for State, Total_Generation, Total_Fuel, and Overall_Heat_Rate, providing the aggregated totals and calculated overall heat rate for each specified state. Save the updated workbook to /home/ga/Documents/eia923_biomass_data.xlsx.
